title: Alya Pack
description: A fan resource pack inspired by Alya and the other characters form the anime
body:
Alya Pack is a fan-made Minecraft resource pack inspired by Alya and the other characters from the anime “Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian.”

This pack replaces selected Minecraft textures with Alya-themed visuals, focusing on a clean, anime-styled aesthetic that blends naturally into vanilla gameplay. The goal is to add subtle character flair without breaking immersion or readability.

## Features

Alya-inspired textures for specific in-game items and UI elements

Clean artwork designed to fit Minecraft’s style

Lightweight and performance-friendly

Works alongside most other resource packs

Why download this pack?

If you enjoy anime-themed customization and want to personalize your Minecraft experience without overwhelming visual noise, this pack adds character and personality while keeping the game playable and familiar.

## Notes

**This is an unofficial fan project**

No gameplay mechanics are changed

Designed for players who want aesthetic customization only

**All rights to the character Alya and original designs belong to their respective creators and Studio Doga Kobo.**
